# MOBI-BA-Major - Molecular Biology, Major

## Download as PDF

[Molecular Biology](https://coursecatalog.coloradocollege.edu/departments/MOBI/overview)UG Bachelor of Arts

## General

## Requirements

### Program

Molecular Biology, Major

### Type

 Major 

### Back to Department Overview

[Molecular Biology](https://coursecatalog.coloradocollege.edu/departments/MOBI/overview)

### Status

 Active 

### Description

The Department of Molecular Biology offers a range of courses that teach students how to understand organisms on a molecular and cellular level. Our focus is on the universal properties shared by all living things, such as the inheritance and use of genetic information. Our majors learn critical thinking skills in molecular biology, such as how to perform and interpret experiments and how to develop and test hypotheses about model organisms, cells, and molecules. More broadly, students will understand how skills and knowledge learned in molecular biology apply to other areas of their lives as global citizens.

Download the Advising Handbook for Molecular Biology through the department website link at the top of this page for all information pertinent to our major and minor.

![Image 2: CC logo](https://coursedog-images-public.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/colorado_college_banner/R6fWe5Fir-Aa-cc-logo-small-cconly-1x-cd.png)
14 E. Cache La Poudre St.

Colorado Springs, CO 80903

[Download Catalog as PDF](https://coursedog-pdfs-public-prod.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/colorado_college_banner/catalog/1070020c-d254-452c-96ad-cda665929acd-colorado_college_banner-catalog-1762185170684.pdf "Generated 11/03/2025")

### Description

The Department of Molecular Biology offers a range of courses that teach students how to understand organisms on a molecular and cellular level. Our focus is on the universal properties shared by all living things, such as the inheritance and use of genetic information. Our majors learn critical thinking skills in molecular biology, such as how to perform and interpret experiments and how to develop and test hypotheses about model organisms, cells, and molecules.
